messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A reply lands in a different topic than the human asked in, so an answered question looks like a dead swarm
What it solves: THE DEFECT AS THE HUMAN EXPERIENCED IT. He asked questions in the group's General topic five times
across one day (08:53, 09:54, 11:08, 13:05, then "So?" at 15:41) and saw total silence, concluding
repeatedly that the swarm was dead. It was not. The front desk received every message, the
Operator p…
How it works: The reply is delivered to the thread the message came from

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-355 - A reply lands in a different topic than the human asked in, so an answered question looks like a dead swarm is complete.
